calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank J. Drago Clerk: K. Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael C. Hall, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Richard T. Fiory, Trustee of the Richard T. Fiory Revocable Trust UDT 05/30/01.
Defendants Sara Brinker and Mark Ferguson were present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 26, 2008.

The terms of the stipulation for entry were read into the record by Mr. Hall. In accordance with said terms, plaintiff Richard T. Fiory, Trustee of the Richard T. Fiory Revocable Trust UDT 05/30/01 shall recover from defendants as follows:

Damages - $8,158.52.
Costs - $375.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $8,533.52.

Plaintiff Richard T. Fiory, Trustee of the Richard T. Fiory Revocable Trust UDT 05/30/01 is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 801 Fillmore Street, #6, San Francisco, CA 94117.

The lease is forfeited.

Stipulation for Entry of Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2008 Continued To Sep-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., SEP-03-2008: MICHAEL CARRILLO HALL, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF RICHARD T. FIORY, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT. LTD. SCOPE ATTORNEY KATHRYN EDWARDS, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT SARA BRINKER, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JPT IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (218).
